summary_one_line: Input must carry the FOURCC 'MCHF' (4d 43 48 46) at the profile data-colorspace field (offset 0x10-0x13) to take the case cmsSigMCHFData arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte data-colorspace FOURCC at offset 0x10-0x13 must equal the exact signature 'MCHF' (4d 43 48 46), which _cmsLCMScolorSpace compares against cmsSigMCHFData to take the true arm at line 869.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every cmplog winner-resolving seed carries the literal ASCII 'MCHF' at offset 0x10-0x13 (e.g. seed 1 '4c 61 62 20 4d 43 48 46' / Lab MCHF at 0x10-0x17, seed 5 '4d 43 48 46' at 0x10). The byte diff shows W concentrates 4d(M)/43(C)/48(H)/46(F) at those four offsets, exactly the cmsSigMCHFData signature.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Naive loser-blocking seeds hold 'RGB ' (52 47 42 20) at offset 0x10-0x13 — a different recognized colorspace that routes to case cmsSigRgbData (line 815), never reaching the cmsSigMCHFData arm. The byte diff marks offsets 0x10/0x11/0x12 DIFFER with L pinned to 52(R)/47(G)/42(B).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace intercepts the integer CMP of the 4-byte colorspace field against the cmsSigMCHFData constant, logs the constant operand, and substitutes it back into the input at the matching offset, planting 'MCHF' where naive's blind havoc would need a 4-byte exact-match jackpot.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same 4-byte FOURCC at offset 0x10-0x13 must reach the exact value 'MCHF' (4d 43 48 46); the switch on ProfileSpace is an exact 4-byte equality, with no partial credit from intermediate bytes.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolved 10/10 trials; the winning bytes carry 'MCHF' at offset 0x10-0x13, matching cmsSigMCHFData and driving the true side (W shows T=17 F=32 on the blocker branch versus L's T=0).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Naive's loser bytes stay at 'RGB ' (52 47 42 20) at offset 0x10-0x13 and the blocker's true side is never taken (L T=0 F=62), so the cmsSigMCHFData arm stays blocked across all 10 naive trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records the operand-distance bucket for the colorspace-field comparison; an input whose field is Hamming-closer to cmsSigMCHFData than any prior input is preserved as corpus, giving a gradient that ratchets the 4-byte field toward 'MCHF' across generations — a feedback path naive lacks.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the case cmsSigMCHFData arm of a switch on the profile colorspace signature, true side globally blocked.
The enclosing switch dispatches on ProfileSpace, so each case is an exact equality against a 4-byte colorspace signature.
cmplog winner-resolving seeds carry the literal 'MCHF' ASCII at the colorspace field.
A cmplog winner has 'MCHF' starting at offset 0x10.
The byte diff shows W concentrates M/C/H/F at offsets 0x10-0x13 while L holds R/G/B, a DIFFER signal.
Naive loser-blocking seeds carry 'RGB ' at the colorspace field, routing to a different case.
On the blocker branch the winner takes the true side while the loser never does (T=0).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 869  T=17 F=32  T=0 F=62  case cmsSigMCHFData:  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which scans the input for an operand and substitutes the other operand at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile preserves inputs whose CMP-operand pair is closer to matching than prior inputs, giving a Hamming-distance gradient.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile resolved all 10 trials while naive blocked all 10.
cmplog won over naive on subject 11 with prob_div 0.80 attributed to the I2S delta.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2282 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 2 --seed 1dac8eeb03e84133` and observed 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 11 and 12 of the ancestor chain, the lower-bound signal of an I2SRandReplace find under the current build. This verification covers the cmplog>naive (I2S) hypothesis; the value_profile>naive pair is attributed to CMP_MAP gradient, not I2S.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose 4-byte colorspace field is compared byte-by-byte (per-byte CMP edges) rather than as one 4-byte equality showing naive resolving the branch as readily as cmplog/value_profile — i.e. the exact-match 4-byte gate is not what blocks naive.

weakest_evidence_point: The value_profile (CMP_MAP gradient) attribution is inferred from mechanism knowledge and final-coverage counts; no value_profile-discovered seed is shown in BRANCH SEEDS (all winner seeds are cmplog-provenance), so the gradient path is not directly traced in lineage.
